About Me

Building things. Learning always.

Hi! I'm Monica — a Computer Science fresher from Hosur, Tamil Nadu, with a B.E. in Computer Science & Technology from Vivekanandha College of Engineering for Women, Tiruchengode.

I've built everything from IoT-powered intrusion detection systems to full-stack web apps and Android tools. I'm actively exploring AI Engineering and building solutions that are both impactful and technically sound — open to roles where I can grow fast and contribute from day one.

Outside of tech, I draw Mandala art, craft things with my hands, and strum guitar — all of which, honestly, teach you something about patterns, patience, and creativity.

Python AI Engineering Power BI IoT Android Dev Web Dev Machine Learning

Projects

Things I've Built

Real-world problems, practical solutions — from IoT to web to Android.

01
Animal Intrusion Detection System
A real-time IoT + ML system that detects animal intrusions on farms — protecting crops while reducing false alerts for agricultural stakeholders.
PythonYOLOCNNIoTSensors2024
  • Achieved 90%+ detection accuracy using YOLO + CNN pipeline on live sensor streams
  • Analyzed sensor data with Python to automate alerts, reducing false positives by an estimated 30%
  • Identified real agricultural business requirements and delivered a practical, stakeholder-aligned solution
02
Fake News Detection System
A web-based credibility classifier that helps users distinguish real news from misinformation using machine learning.
HTMLCSSJavaScriptMLMongoDB2026
  • Built a responsive frontend connected to an ML classification backend
  • Integrated MongoDB for efficient news data storage and retrieval
  • Designed an intuitive result display that makes credibility scores easy to understand
03
Leave Letter Management System
A full-stack web app that automates leave submissions and approvals — cutting manual processing time significantly for colleges.
HTMLCSSJavaScriptXAMPP2025
  • Reduced manual leave processing time by 40% through smart workflow automation
  • Collaborated cross-functionally with students, faculty, and admin to gather requirements
  • Delivered a clean, role-based access system with approval tracking
04
College Admission Chatbot
An AI-driven conversational chatbot that answers admission queries for prospective students — faster and at scale.
HTMLCSSJavaScriptConversational AI2024
  • Improved response efficiency by 50% compared to manual enquiry handling
  • Explored intent recognition to handle varied student query patterns
  • Designed a friendly, approachable chat UI focused on user experience
06
Cybersecurity Job Simulation – Mastercard (Forage)
Hands-on virtual job simulation exploring real-world cybersecurity practices used at Mastercard — focused on phishing and threat awareness.
CybersecurityMastercardForageMar 2026
  • Designed phishing email simulations to understand social engineering attack patterns
  • Analyzed phishing results to identify vulnerabilities in user behaviour
  • Learned basic threat detection and cybersecurity awareness techniques
07
UX Design Job Simulation – Forage
Virtual UX design simulation covering foundational research and design thinking practices — exploring how teams approach user-centered design.
UX ResearchForageUser SurveysMar 2026
  • Conducted competitive analysis and customer research to understand user needs
  • Designed and structured user surveys for effective data collection
  • Gained practical exposure to user-centered design and UX research methodologies
08
Calculator App (Android)
A clean, functional Android calculator with a user-tested interface — my first foray into mobile app development.
AndroidJavaEclipse2024
  • Designed and deployed a clean Android UI with intuitive input handling
  • Applied user feedback analysis to refine edge-case input behaviour
  • Built a solid foundation in Android lifecycle and Java event handling
